args: try { $j = [Console]::In.ReadToEnd() | ConvertFrom-Json } catch { exit 0 }; if ($j.tool_input.file_path -like '*deck-estimator*') { @{ hookSpecificOutput = @{ hookEventName = 'PostToolUse'; additionalContext = 'You changed deck-estimator.html. Before ending this turn, VERIFY THE SAVE FEATURE still works: in the preview, reload the page, confirm there is no load-time script error (e.g. window.__LOADERR is undefined), then click the Save button and confirm the layout persists to localStorage. Save has broken repeatedly from a top-level throw in script 1 that silently unbinds the Save/Load buttons (e.g. a forward cross-script reference).' } } | ConvertTo-Json -Compress }
